sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43055" key="e)sxatoko/llion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐσχᾰτοκόλλιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n43055.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">end</tr_> of a papyrus roll, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Mart.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.6.3</biblScope> </bibl> ; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πρωτὁκολλον.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
